objective: Add integration tests for critical scheduler and lifecycle flows
background: E2E tests missing for critical flows: scheduler, lifecycle, learning, signal, sync. These paths have no automated regression protection.
constraints: Do not make tests depend on live market data
Do not require a running broker or live trading session
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Integration tests written for: scheduler, lifecycle, learning
Tests use a test DB or mocks — no production data dependency
All new tests pass in CI
Tests documented in README with run instructions
required_outputs: Integration tests written for: scheduler, lifecycle, learning
Tests use a test DB or mocks — no production data dependency
All new tests pass in CI
Tests documented in README with run instructions
forbidden_changes: Do not make tests depend on live market data
Do not require a running broker or live trading session
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
